topic: Can chemistry predict which perfume will become a bestseller?

seo_titles: Can chemistry predict which perfume will become a bestseller?
Can Chemistry Predict a Perfume Bestseller?
What Chemistry Predict Means for the Market
The Science and Business of Chemistry Predict
story_angles: Question — can chemistry and data predict which perfume becomes a bestseller?
Mechanism — compare formulation science, market share, consumer testing, and brand launch evidence.
Takeaway — what prediction models get right and what branding still decides for bestseller success.
